description: Machine-readable contract for AKOÚŌ v0.8. Host apps should load this manifest (and presets/presets.json) instead of hand-copying mode lists, command chains, evidence permissions, or accountable-listening fields from prose. Sentinel skill ids: 'router-selected' marks slots the router fills at run time; 'all-listening-modes' marks the comparative command's non-covenant sweep.

skills.label: Router
skills.summary: Analyzes the listening situation and assigns primary, secondary, and corrective modes with evidence limits and claim permissions.

skills.label: Signal inspection
skills.summary: Technical ear for file, waveform, spectrogram, metadata, dynamics, frequency, stereo, artifacts, and measurable signal behavior.

skills.label: Acoulogical object
skills.summary: Perceptual ear for the auditum: texture, morphology, movement, and shape before source or meaning claims.

skills.label: Embodied affective
skills.summary: Body and affect ear for pressure, vibration, fatigue, pleasure, dread, propulsion, and bodily force.

skills.label: Transductive media
skills.summary: Mediation ear for sensors, microphones, codecs, datasets, platforms, models, and conversion chains.

skills.label: Forensic archival
skills.summary: Evidentiary ear for testimony, archives, damage, custody, and recordings with legal or harm stakes.

skills.label: Ecological posthuman
skills.summary: More-than-human ear for habitat, weather, field recording, infrastructure, and ecological relations.

skills.label: Critical political
skills.summary: Power ear for platforms, labor, race, class, gender, coloniality, surveillance, access, and infrastructure stakes.

skills.label: Musical aesthetic
skills.summary: Musical ear for rhythm, pitch, harmony, timbre, texture, form, production aesthetics, and creative usefulness with genre caution.

skills.label: Symbolic fictional
skills.summary: Declared speculative ear for sonic fiction, myth, ritual, worldbuilding, and possible worlds.

skills.label: Audiovisual scenic
skills.summary: Sound-image-text-scene ear for video, film, games, UI sound, captions, synchronization, and audiovisual phrasing.

skills.label: Voice speech
skills.summary: Voice and transcript ear for speech, ASR, TTS, voice agents, prosody, intelligibility, identity caution, and consent.

skills.label: Accessibility normative
skills.summary: Access ear for captions, transcripts, haptics, sensory variation, fatigue, masking, and implied listener assumptions.

skills.label: Material event
skills.summary: Material ear for vibration, resonance, duration, flux, propagation, loudspeakers, rooms, and sonic process.

skills.label: Memory lineage
skills.summary: Memory ear that listens with stored sound-memories: recurrence, kinship, lineage, and change over time, without treating memory as evidence.

skills.label: Sovereign
skills.summary: Sovereignty ear that listens under an explicit covenant: enforces its executable rules (refuse, ignore, withhold, coarsen, retain nothing), carries its non-executable commitments verbatim, and reports withholding as honest, attributed absence.

skills.label: Reference layer
skills.summary: Maps listening results to concepts, methods, traditions, research routes, cautions, and adjacent modes.

commands.name: /listen
commands.label: Listen
commands.summary: Default routed pass through router-selected primary, secondary, and corrective ears.

commands.name: /full-ear
commands.label: Full ear
commands.summary: Broad multimodal scan across signal, object, music, body, mediation, and material event.

commands.name: /study
commands.label: Study
commands.summary: Research-oriented route for sonic methods, critique, context, and references.

commands.name: /tech
commands.label: Tech
commands.summary: Technical inspection of file, waveform, spectrogram, metadata, and media chain.

commands.name: /reference
commands.label: Reference
commands.summary: Conceptual map of methods, authors, traditions, cautions, and adjacent modes.

commands.name: /litany
commands.label: Litany
commands.summary: Audits simplistic sound-versus-vision claims through grounded listening.

commands.name: /fiction
commands.label: Fiction
commands.summary: Declared speculative sonic worldbuilding with affective and critical corrections.

commands.name: /forensic
commands.label: Forensic
commands.summary: Strict evidentiary pass for testimony, archives, damage, and harm contexts.

commands.name: /transduce
commands.label: Transduce
commands.summary: Mediation-chain mapping for sensors, codecs, models, sonification, and platforms.

commands.name: /voice
commands.label: Voice
commands.summary: Voice and speech pass with identity, consent, and access cautions.

commands.name: /audiovision
commands.label: Audiovision
commands.summary: Sound-image-scene pass for video, film, games, captions, and synchronization.

commands.name: /access
commands.label: Access
commands.summary: Accessibility and hearing-norm audit for captions, haptics, alerts, and implied listeners.

commands.name: /field
commands.label: Field
commands.summary: Field-recording and situated-listening route with mediation and ethics cautions.

commands.name: /method
commands.label: Method
commands.summary: Sonic methodology and agent-handoff route for research design and workflow planning.

commands.name: /route
commands.label: Route
commands.summary: Router-only handoff plan: mode chain, evidence limits, risks, and forbidden assumptions.

commands.name: /remember
commands.label: Remember
commands.summary: Memory route: situates the sound in its lineage against stored records and registers the listening into the store.

commands.name: /covenant
commands.label: Covenant
commands.summary: Sovereignty route: verifies and applies a listening covenant, listens to what it admits, and reports enforcement, withholding, and commitments honestly.

commands.name: /one-sound-many-ears
commands.label: One sound many ears
commands.summary: Comparative flagship: one sonic object through every public listening mode.

evidence_ladder.notes: No usable input: stop and request the object, input type, or intent.
heard covers prompt content only; inferences from prompt logic only; interpretation must be marked as a reading of a description.
measured covers metadata facts only; interpret cautiously.
heard only if audio was actually decoded and described; measured covers duration, sample rate, channels, and basic amplitude only.
measured within the limits of the tool used; declare the apparatus.
heard covers text content only, never vocal sound; inferences limited to segmentation and format; interpretation marked as text-based.
heard covers described content only; inferences from stated context.
Apply the weakest applicable permission to each individual claim per component; measured requires an actually-measured component.

/forensic.note: Strict evidentiary route: paralinguistic and interpretive speculation is suppressed; emotion, age, gender, and identity guesses demote to undetermined.

/fiction.note: Declared fiction grants speculative permission by user intent; evidence categories keep their ladder limits.
